title: FanaBridge Wheel Profile
description:
Defines LED layout, display type, and input mappings for a Fanatec steering wheel or module.

schemaVersion history:
  1 — initial schema (channel/role/hwIndex LED model, match by wheelType/moduleType)

schemaVersion.description: Profile format version. Must equal 1 for this schema. Increment when breaking changes to the format are needed, then update or replace this schema accordingly.

id.description: Unique profile identifier, typically matching the SDK type code(s) (e.g. "PSWBMW", "PHUB_PBMR").

name.description: Full product name (e.g. "Fanatec Podium Steering Wheel BMW M4 GT3").

shortName.description: Abbreviated display name used in the SimHub UI.

match.description: Criteria used to auto-detect this profile from the SDK-reported hardware identity.

wheelType.description: SDK wheel type short code (FS_WHEEL_SWTYPE_ prefix stripped, e.g. "PSWBMW", "PHUB").

moduleType.description: Optional SDK module type short code (FS_WHEEL_SW_MODULETYPE_ prefix stripped, e.g. "PBMR", "PBME"). Omit for standalone wheels with no attached module.

display.description: Screen/display type present on this wheel: "none" = no display, "basic" = basic status display, "itm" = ITM display.

colorFormat.description: Pixel encoding for the Color LED channel. Defaults to "rgb565" (5-6-5). Set to "rgb555" for hardware whose LED controller only reads 5 green bits (e.g. Button Module Rally).

leds.description: Ordered array of LED definitions. The array index is the SimHub logical LED index.

LedDefinition.description: Describes a single physical LED on the device.

channel.description: Hardware communication channel — determines the col03 sub-command and encoding used. "rev" = subcmd 0x00 (RPM strip), "flag" = subcmd 0x01 (status flags), "color" = subcmd 0x02 (RGB565/555 button area), "mono" = subcmd 0x03 (3-bit intensity).

hwIndex.description: Zero-based index within the channel's protocol array (e.g. slot in the color array for subcmd 0x02, byte index in the mono payload for subcmd 0x03).

role.description: Semantic role of this LED. Drives SimHub categorization and future auto-mapping: "rev" = RPM/shift, "flag" = status/warning, "button" = button backlight, "encoder" = encoder knob, "indicator" = general-purpose.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the SimHub UI (e.g. "Button 1", "Left encoder").

input.description: Legacy single-input association (e.g. "enc_left"). Kept for backward compatibility — prefer inputMapping for new profiles.

InputMapping.description: Structured input association for a single LED. Supports button, relative encoder (CW/CCW), and absolute encoder (per-detent) mappings; any combination may be present simultaneously.

button.description: SimHub input ID for a momentary push-button (e.g. "JoystickPlugin.FANATEC_Wheel.Button3"). Null/omitted when not applicable.

relative.description: Relative (incremental) encoder input IDs: [CW input, CCW input]. Null/omitted when not applicable.

absolute.description: Absolute (positional) encoder input IDs — one entry per detent in detection order (typically 12 entries for Fanatec encoders). Null/omitted when not applicable.
